title: From sign-up to first onboarding
subtitle: Live in 5 steps. It takes less than 10 minutes.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.text: Go to onvanta.io and click 'Start free'. Enter your name, company name and email address. You'll receive a magic link — no password needed. The first 14 days are completely free.

steps.title: Set up your branding
steps.text: Go to Settings → Branding. Upload your logo and choose your primary colour. Every new employee will immediately see that it's your company.

steps.title: Create your first onboarding template
steps.text: Go to Templates and click 'New template'. Choose a role (e.g. Customer Service, Sales, Operator) and give the template a name. Add steps with text, video, quizzes or flashcards. You can also choose from our library of 30 ready-made templates, or let AI generate a template based on a job description.

steps.title: Invite your first employee
steps.text: Go to Onboardings → New onboarding. Enter the name and email address of your new employee and link the right template. The employee automatically receives an invitation email with a personal magic link.

steps.title: Track progress in your dashboard
steps.text: In the manager dashboard you can see immediately how far each employee is. Is someone falling behind? You'll automatically receive an at-risk alert so you can step in early — before the 30-day review.
